params.prompt: Explain multi-agent orchestration (orchestrator-worker) for security in 3 sentences.

output: Multi-agent orchestration, specifically the orchestrator-worker model, utilizes a central "orchestrator" agent to intelligently distribute and manage security tasks across numerous independent "worker" agents. This decentralized approach improves scalability and resilience by allowing workers to handle specific threats or vulnerabilities concurrently, while the orchestrator maintains overall control and coordination.  Ultimately, it creates a more agile and responsive security system capable of adapting to evolving risks in real-time.
